title: Architecture flow benchmark seed
prompt: Build a local project brain for a two-package TypeScript workspace and report architecture, flow, evidence, and unknown coverage from deterministic artifacts.

pass: The fixture produces multiple local components and at least one reconstructed flow.
Architecture reasoning reports boundary and flow surfaces from static files.
Architecture assumptions explain evidence-backed boundaries, design pressures, coupling rationale, confidence, and evidence gaps.
Evidence and unknown coverage are scored from benchmark_ready.json without provider calls.
fail: The benchmark depends on package installation or network access.
Cross-package evidence is omitted from architecture artifacts.
Unknown coverage is not represented in the benchmark-ready artifact.
